grounding_checkpoint_required: Scan a real ISBN (e.g. 9780307887436). Confirm the scan result card shows two eBay rows: 'eBay CA (active)' and 'eBay CA (sold 30d)'. Open devtools > Network > filter /api/scan > confirm response body contains 'ebaySold' field (may be null for books with no recent sold comps — that is acceptable). If soldCount > 0, confirm the low-high range sub-line renders below the avg line.
